source_metadata.title: 2025/12/02 - FD (Part 1)
source_metadata.description:
Tuesday 2 December 2025 | Foreign Affairs, Defence and Trade Committee

2024/25 Annual review of the Ministry of Defence; 2024/25 Annual review of the New Zealand Defence Force

Hearing of evidence:
Submitter list:

Hon Chris Penk, Minister for Veterans, Associate Minister of Defence

Ministry of Defence

Brook Barrington, Chief Executive
Pasanka Wickremasinghe, Chief Financial Officer
Sarah Minson, Deputy Secretary Capability Delivery
Huntley Wright, Assistance Secretary Capability Delivery


New Zealand Defence Force

Air Marshal Tony Davies, Chief of Defence Force
Rear Admiral Mat Williams, Vice Chief of Defence Force
Alex Brunt, Acting Head of Veterans’ Affairs
Jacinda Funnell, Chief People Officer
Bridget Marks, Chief Finance Officer
Brigadier James Kennedy-Good, Director Defence Legal Service
Brigadier Andrew Shaw, Assistant Chief Strategic Commitments
Mark Brunton, Head of Defence and Infrastructure
